query: SELECT ic.id, ic.label, ic.channelNo FROM instrumentChannels ic JOIN weighingInstruments wi ON ic.instrumentId = wi.id WHERE wi.deviceCode = 'C002' ORDER BY ic.channelNo LIMIT 10;
